_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular conformation of the full-length tumor suppressor NF2/Merlin--a small-angle neutron scattering study.

_contextSnippet: the crystal structure of Moesin fits better in the map of d Ezrin envelope than in that of d Merlin or d Merlin(S518D)
details: Successfully used for docking crystal structure of Moesin into 3-D shapes, showing better fit in Ezrin envelope than in Merlin envelopes
